allow: Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('total results:', len\(d.get\('results',[]\)\)\); [print\(r['id'], '|', r['name'][:50]\) for r in d.get\('results',[]\)]")

Bash(node -e "require\('./routes/productos'\); require\('./routes/ml'\); require\('./sources/mercadolibre'\); require\('./sources/fakestore'\); require\('./sources/dummyjson'\); require\('./services/dolar'\); require\('./services/mlToken'\); console.log\('require OK - sin errores de sintaxis'\);")

PowerShell(try { $s = Invoke-RestMethod "http://localhost:3000/api/ml/status"; "STATUS:"; $s | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 4 } catch { "status error: $_" }; "---"; try { $r = Invoke-RestMethod "http://localhost:3000/api/productos/buscar?q=iphone&limite=12&fuentes=mercadolibre"; "ML productos: $\($r.productos.Count\)"; $r.productos | Select-Object -First 3 nombre, precio, sin_precio | ConvertTo-Json } catch { "buscar error: $_" })

PowerShell("--- /api/ml/status ---"; curl.exe -s "https://tp-apis-0p3v.onrender.com/api/ml/status" 2>&1; "`n--- Busqueda ML iphone \(produccion\) ---"; $r = curl.exe -s "https://tp-apis-0p3v.onrender.com/api/productos/buscar?q=iphone&limite=6&fuentes=mercadolibre" 2>&1; $r | ConvertFrom-Json | ForEach-Object { $_.productos } | Select-Object -First 5 nombre, precio, sin_precio | ConvertTo-Json)

PowerShell($f = "C:\\Users\\pipec\\OneDrive\\Desktop\\PrecioYa - Informe y Presentacion.docx"; Add-Type -AssemblyName System.IO.Compression.FileSystem; try { $zip = [System.IO.Compression.ZipFile]::OpenRead\($f\); $hasDoc = \($zip.Entries | Where-Object { $_.FullName -eq "word/document.xml" }\); $docXml = $zip.Entries | Where-Object { $_.FullName -eq "word/document.xml" }; $reader = New-Object System.IO.StreamReader\($docXml.Open\(\)\); $content = $reader.ReadToEnd\(\); $reader.Close\(\); $zip.Dispose\(\); [xml]$x = $content; "VALIDO: XML bien formado, $\([math]::Round\(\(Get-Item $f\).Length/1KB,1\)\) KB" } catch { "PROBLEMA: $_" }; Remove-Item -Force "C:\\Users\\pipec\\OneDrive\\Desktop\\PrecioYa - Guion Presentacion.docx" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Remove-Item -Recurse -Force "C:\\Users\\pipec\\docx_tmp" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; "Archivo viejo eliminado y temporales limpiados.")
